// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (g): an ungated exec argv
// carrying a specID-named identifier. Absent from the audit table,
// the site must be flagged UNCLASSIFIED.
package fixture

import (
	"os"
	"os/exec"
)

func ungatedShow() ([]byte, error) {
	specID := os.Getenv("MINDSPEC_FIXTURE_SPEC") // agent-writable, no idvalidate
	return exec.Command("bd", "show", specID, "--json").Output()
}
